name: Amazon ECR Repository
description: Schema representing an Amazon Elastic Container Registry repository, which stores Docker container images and OCI artifacts.

repositoryArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the repository.

registryId.description: The AWS account ID associated with the registry that contains the repository.

repositoryUri.description: The URI for the repository, used for docker pull and push operations.

createdAt.description: The date and time, in JavaScript date format, when the repository was created.

imageTagMutability.description: The tag mutability setting for the repository. When set to IMMUTABLE, all image tags within the repository are prevented from being overwritten.

imageScanningConfiguration.description: The image scanning configuration for the repository.

scanOnPush.description: The setting that determines whether images are scanned after being pushed to a repository.

encryptionConfiguration.description: The encryption configuration for the repository.

kmsKey.description: If you use the KMS encryption type, specify the KMS key to use for encryption.

imageCount.description: The number of images in the repository.

repositoryPolicy.description: The JSON repository policy text associated with the repository.

lifecyclePolicy.description: The lifecycle policy for the repository.

registryId.description: The registry ID associated with the lifecycle policy.

repositoryName.description: The repository name associated with the lifecycle policy.

lastEvaluatedAt.description: The time stamp of the last time the lifecycle policy was run.

tags.description: The metadata tags applied to the repository.
